title: asplenium fontanum var. lanceolatum
intro: Asplenium fontanum var. lanceolatum, commonly known as the lance-leaved spleenwort, is a variant of the Asplenium fontanum fern species, which is native to Europe, Western Asia, and North Africa. This plant is used in herbal medicine due to its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic qualities. The health benefits of Asplenium fontanum var. lanceolatum include reducing fever, treating skin conditions, and relieving respiratory issues such as bronchitis and asthma. In herbal preparations, the plant is often made into teas, infusions, or tinctures, which can be used to alleviate various health conditions.
